name: MANITOU B.F. SA INH. EO 1
summary: Manitou B.F. S.A. designs, manufactures, distributes and services all-terrain material handling equipment. The company’s product range includes telehandlers, all-terrain forklifts, access platforms, skid steer loaders, truck-mounted forklifts, warehousing equipment and attachments. Manitou is headquartered in Ancenis, France.
